findings.description: The JSP code example contains the comment `<%-- n:hiddenでフォームデータを維持 --%>` which does not appear in the source file. The source has no such comment; it only lists the `n:hidden` tags without annotation.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP example contains no comment between the n:compositeKeyCheckbox tag and the n:hidden tags.

findings.description: The sentence "各行のユーザーデータは`n:hidden`フィールドで保持し、次画面へのフォームデータ送信を確保する" is an interpretation not stated in the source. The source shows the n:hidden usage in code but does not explicitly describe its purpose as "次画面へのフォームデータ送信を確保する".
findings.source_evidence: Source only shows the n:hidden tags in the JSP example without explanation of their purpose.

findings.description: The hints for s1 are missing `namePrefix` and `valueObject`, both of which are explicitly used as attributes of `n:compositeKeyCheckbox` in the JSP code example (`namePrefix="form"`, `valueObject="${row}"`) and are relevant for finding this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP: `<n:compositeKeyCheckbox namePrefix="form" valueObject="${row}" keyNames="userId,pk2,pk3" name="form.userCompositeKeys" />`
